title: Europe — told of Iran strikes just 'minutes' before they started — struggles to be heard as war escalates
summary_full: Europe appears to have been on the sidelines as the U.S. and Israel pursue Iran, and crisis engulfs the Middle East.
summary_public: Europe appears to have been on the sidelines as the U.S. and Israel pursue Iran, and crisis engulfs the Middle East.
